note.text: Specimen visually inspected prior to dipstick testing. Color graded against the laboratory's standard urine color chart under fluorescent lighting per SOP UA-COLOR-07 rev 4; note that ambient lighting differences between collection sites (Sample City main campus vs. the 4242 Coverage Court satellite draw station) have historically produced one-step grading discrepancies, so dark amber results are routinely confirmed by a second technologist before release. Confirmed by S. Técnico-Müller, MLS(ASCP); patient instructions were provided in English and 中文. Specific gravity correlation pending — see urinalysis dipstick panel for full results. Volume received: 30 µL aliquot from a 50 mL collection container.
